name: module-structure
question: How should the DDL generator module be organized?
decision: Create src/ddl/ as top-level module (sibling to query/, composition/) with submodules: types.ts (interfaces), type-mapper.ts (JSON Schema → SQL types), constraint-builder.ts (PK, FK, NOT NULL), table-generator.ts (CREATE TABLE), dialect.ts (PostgreSQL/SQLite), utils.ts (escapeIdentifier, topological sort), index.ts (barrel exports)
rationale: Follows query module pattern found in analysis. Separation of concerns: type mapping, constraint inference, SQL generation are distinct responsibilities. Dialect abstraction allows adding MySQL/etc later. Utils are reusable by SqlBackend.
